title: Croparium: Cataclysm
description: Turn L_Ender's Cataclysm ores into farmable crops— grab materials once, and regrow them nonstop, instead of endless boss-hunting!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2faa4f08a7e099bee833d9f036f5c03cdef542d5.png)
## Dependencies
Two required dependencies— [**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium) and [**L_Ender's Cataclysm**](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm). 

What this mod basically does is add farming functionality for 9 minerals and materials from L_Ender's Cataclysm. 

Those materials used to be a real hassle to get in the original mod—you had to run around the map and fight bosses repeatedly just to collect them. But now with this farming feature, players who hate all that hassle only need to get the materials once. After that, you can keep regrowing them nonstop, no more endless running for hunting!
## Requirements for Crop Growth
Each material’s crop needs a specific type of farmland, though: 

Witherite Crop & Ignitium Crop: **Nether Crop Farmland**

Enderite Crop: **End Crop Farmland**

Crystallized Coral Crop & Coral Chunk Crop: **Marine Resource Farmland**. 

Ancient Metal Crop, Black Steel Crop, Cursium Crop, and Lacrima Crop: **Overworld Ore Farmland**.
## How to Cultivate Suitable Farmland
Setting up the farmland is easy too—just hold any pickaxe and right-click the corresponding type of stone, and you’re good to go. But there are two small details to keep in mind: Nether Ore Farmland doesn't use water to stay “moist”—instead, you need lava within a 4-block horizontal radius. And Ocean Resource Farmland either needs to hold water itself or be adjacent to water, otherwise the ocean-themed crops won’t grow right.

If you want to know the specifics—like how to get seeds, step-by-step planting tips, or crop growth cycles—just check out the main [**Croparium**](https://modrinth.com/mod/croparium) mod’s instructions. It covers way more detail than this!

![Growable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5692f9325792c2914c9e1c4a5e71c0250b5ed83c.png)
